summary: The right issues were found, but their severities were downgraded too far.

findings.title: Applying a no-result ingredient filter leaves stale recipes visible
findings.expected: Applying an empty filter should either disable the CTA or show an empty result state.
findings.actual: The stale recipe list remains visible after applying a no-result ingredient filter.
repro_steps: Open the ingredient filter on mobile-ios-small.
Search for a non-existent ingredient and tap apply.

findings.title: Recipe detail duplicates the share action in two separate rows
findings.expected: The detail screen should expose one share affordance for the same action.
findings.actual: The screen shows a share action in both the hero and lower action row.
repro_steps: Compare the hero controls and the lower action row.

checklistCoverage.notes: No-op apply bug recorded but downgraded.
